Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}You're practically a regular here, aren't you? What will you have today?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22507 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}...Hey, are you all right? You're pale as a sheet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}Tomorrow's the graduation ceremony. Maybe you should go home and get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22507 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Hey, are you sick? You're pale as a sheet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}Tomorrow's the graduation ceremony. Maybe you should go home and get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22504 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Go home and rest. You don't want to still be sick for the graduation ceremony tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
